heroSubtitle: Industry-grade pallet trucks, stackers, forklifts and custom material handling equipment built for peak performance. Over 500+ product variants. Delivered across India.
address: Plot 47, MIDC Industrial Area, Chinchwad, Pune — 411019, Maharashtra, India
aboutText1: VoltLift Equipment has been at the forefront of India's material handling industry for over two decades. Founded in Pune, we design, manufacture and supply a comprehensive range of industrial equipment trusted by leading names across automotive, pharma, logistics and FMCG sectors.
aboutText2: Our 80,000 sq.ft. manufacturing facility houses cutting-edge CNC machinery and a dedicated R&D division that continuously pushes the boundaries of ergonomic and energy-efficient design.
metaDescription: VoltLift Equipment — cutting-edge pallet trucks, stackers, forklifts and custom material handling equipment. Serving industry across India.
